name: mfe-labs
description: MFE Federation Simulation Lab - Real-world bundle metrics with Native/Module/Single-SPA federation

scripts.build:all: npm run build:mfes && npm run build:shell
scripts.build:mfes: for dir in MFEs/*/*; do [ -d "$dir" ] && (cd "$dir" && npm run build 2>/dev/null || true); done
scripts.build:shell: cd native-federation-shell-angular && npm run build 2>/dev/null || echo 'Shell build not available'
scripts.clean: npm run clean:mfes && npm run clean:shell
scripts.clean:mfes: for dir in MFEs/*/*; do [ -d "$dir" ] && (cd "$dir" && rm -rf node_modules dist .angular 2>/dev/null || true); done
scripts.open:shell: open http://localhost:8080 || xdg-open http://localhost:8080 || start http://localhost:8080

author: MFE-LABS Team
